case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER VS. PIYUSH BHAGAT et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER DBA THE GATEWAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BHAGAT, PIYUSH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 JACKSON STREET, APT. 501, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94111, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER DBA THE GATEWAY
ORDER OF THE COURT FOR STAY OF EXECUTION
